name: agent_bare_model_prefix
input:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
model: opus
tools: Read, Edit, Bash
---
Body text here.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
model: anthropic/opus
permission: {allow: [Read, Edit, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body text here.

name: agent_already_prefixed_model_idempotent
input:
---
name: architect
model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-8
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-8
permission: {allow: [Read], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: agent_multi_tools
input:
---
description: Implementer
model: sonnet
tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob
---
expectedOutput:
---
description: Implementer
model: anthropic/sonnet
permission: {allow: [Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---

name: agent_empty_tools
input:
---
name: init
model: haiku
tools: 
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: init
model: anthropic/haiku
permission: {allow: [], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: agent_effort_dropped
input:
---
name: orchestrator
model: sonnet
effort: high
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: orchestrator
model: anthropic/sonnet
permission: {allow: [Read], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: S-4: effort is dropped — opencode has no effort field. This case asserts the drop so a future reader does not restore it.

name: agent_color_passthrough
input:
---
name: architect
model: opus
color: purple
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
model: anthropic/opus
permission: {allow: [Read], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
color: purple
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: agent_blanket_mode_subagent
input:
---
name: orchestrator
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: orchestrator
model: anthropic/sonnet
permission: {allow: [Read], ask: [], deny: []}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: Generic transform injects mode: subagent for ALL agents — including orchestrator. The mode-by-role override (orchestrator → primary) is an installer layer applied AFTER this generic transform and is NOT reflected here (AC-12).

name: command_string_allowed_tools
input:
---
name: my-command
description: A command
model: sonnet
allowed-tools: Read Edit Bash
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: my-command
description: A command
model: anthropic/sonnet
permission: {allow: [Read, Edit, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: command_array_allowed_tools
input:
---
name: deploy
description: Deploy command
model: sonnet
allowed-tools: [Read, Bash]
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: deploy
description: Deploy command
model: anthropic/sonnet
permission: {allow: [Read, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: reject_inline_injection_in_body
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Some text !`evil` more text.
note: SEC-DR-4: inline bang-backtick injection in body is rejected fail-closed.

name: reject_fenced_injection_in_body
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
```!evil
```
note: SEC-DR-4: fenced triple-backtick-bang injection in body is rejected fail-closed.

name: reject_injection_in_toplevel_string_value
input:
---
name: bad
description: Run !`evil` here
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: injection in a top-level frontmatter string value is rejected.

name: reject_injection_in_nested_object_value
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
permission: {allow: [!`evil`]}
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: injection in a nested object value (recursive check) is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_proto_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
__proto__: {isAdmin: true}
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: __proto__ at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_constructor_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
constructor: evil
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: constructor at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_prototype_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
prototype: evil
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: prototype at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_proto_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  __proto__: injected
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: __proto__ nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.

name: reject_pollution_key_constructor_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  constructor: evil
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: constructor nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.

name: reject_pollution_key_prototype_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  prototype: evil
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: prototype nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.
